query:
SELECT c.contract_no, c.approve_date, c.commission_net, c.section,
       i.updated_by, i.updated_at
FROM contracts c
LEFT JOIN installments i ON i.contract_no = c.contract_no AND i.section = c.section AND i.updated_by IS NOT NULL
WHERE c.commission_net IS NOT NULL AND c.commission_net > 0 AND c.section = 'Boonphone'
ORDER BY c.approve_date DESC, i.updated_at DESC
LIMIT 5
command:
